problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: If Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
